entity.summary: Native order-book decentralized spot exchange on the Hotstuff DeFi Layer 1, providing current on-chain spot trading through a dedicated first-party application.
entity.notes: Current first-party Hotstuff trading application remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Hotstuff Spot as an order-book DEX on the Hotstuff chain and reports non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour spot volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Hotstuff official spot trading application
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Hotstuff trading application endpoint remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Hotstuff Spot volume metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Hotstuff Spot as an order-book DEX and reports non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume plus cumulative volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Hotstuff Spot DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Hotstuff Spot as a decentralized spot exchange in the Hotstuff ecosystem.
